docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,010.72 FILED BY HOUSE OF BRANHAM A CORP. DBA COLONIAL HOME PRODUCTS & NATIONAL ACCEPTANCE CO. AS TO DEFENDANT BERTULDO, ERNA I. BERTULDO, BOBBY I. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-08-1995 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT C
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT BERTULDO, ERNA I.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HOUSE OF BRANHAM A CORP. DBA COLONIAL HOME PRODUCTS & NATIONAL ACCEPTANCE CO. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BERTULDO, ERNA I. $1,010.72 PRINCIPAL, $63.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,073.72 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT BERTULDO, ERNA I. BERTULDO, BOBBY I.
